case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA VS. VICTOR LIONEL MORAN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORAN, VICTOR LIONEL $921.63 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $921.63 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $921.63 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, VICTOR LIONEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-12-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JOANNE MADDEN. APPEARANCE BY VIRGINA HO, CLAIMS ADJUSTER FOR THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MTA. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT VICTOR LIONEL MORAN. PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
